title: IMDS SSRF credential theft in aws-vpc

kill_chain.technique: T1552.005 Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API
kill_chain.description: 172.31.0.40 queried the instance metadata service (169.254.169.254) for AWS IAM credentials — SSRF-to-IMDS theft (the Capital One pattern).

malicious_flows.technique: T1552.005 Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API
